message: fix epic week dates to be saturday instead of sunday
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
clean up the age groupings for comparisons of obesity and diabetes in BRFSS and Cosmos
fix extension of files; rerun epic
replace xz with gz for Epic

age.long_description: Age group, based on age in current years.

n_vaccine_mmr.long_name: Immunizations for Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR)
n_vaccine_mmr.short_description: Number with Immunizations: Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR) receipt
n_vaccine_mmr.long_description: Number with Immunizations: Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR) receipt by Age in Years (Current) Range and State of Residence (U.S.).

mmr_receipt.long_name: Immunizations for Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR): Percent
mmr_receipt.short_description: Percentage with Immunizations: Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR) receipt
mmr_receipt.long_description: Percentage with Immunizations: Measles, Mumps, and Rubella (MMR) receipt by Age in Years (Current) Range and State of Residence (U.S.).

n_obesity_county.long_description: Total number of patients within the county-level obesity sample.

hemoglobin_a1c_7.short_description: Percent of sample with HcA1C test results of 7% or more.
hemoglobin_a1c_7.long_description: Percent of sample with Hemoglobin A1C test results of 7% or more.

bmi_30_49.8.long_name: Body Mass Index ( BMI) between 30 and 49.8
bmi_30_49.8.short_description: Percent of sample with a BMI between 30 and 49.8.
bmi_30_49.8.long_description: Percent of sample with a Body Mass Index (BMI) between 30 and 49.8.

n_rsv_tests.long_name: Emergency Room (ER) Encounters with Positive Respiratory Syntactical Virus (RSV) Tests
n_rsv_tests.short_description: Number of ER encounters with positive RSV tests.
n_rsv_tests.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with positive Respiratory Syntactical Virus (RSV) tests (ICD-10-CM J12-J18 pneumonia).

rsv_tests.long_name: Percent of Emergency Room (ER) Visits with Positive Respiratory Syntactical Virus (RSV) Tests
rsv_tests.short_description: Percent of ER encounters with positive RSV tests.
rsv_tests.long_description: Percent of emergency room (ER) encounters with positive Respiratory Syntactical Virus (RSV) tests (ICD-10-CM J12-J18 pneumonia).

epic_n_all_encounters.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with All ICD-10-CM codes.

epic_n_self_harm.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with Self-Harm ICD-10-CM codes.

epic_n_covid.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with COVID ICD-10-CM codes.

epic_n_flu.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with FLU ICD-10-CM codes.

epic_n_rsv.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with RSV ICD-10-CM codes.

percentage_with_base_patient_followed_by.short_description: Percent of sample with HcA1C test results of 6.5% or more.
percentage_with_base_patient_followed_by.long_description: Percent of sample with Hemoglobin A1C test results of 6.5% or more.
